text:
Title: Developing Creative and Innovation Characters through Islamic Educational Approach Based on KH. M.A. Sahal Mahfudh’s Educational Ideas This study examines KH. M.A. Sahal Mahfudh’s educational ideas and aims to know whether or not the ideas can be applied as a conceptual framework for solving the existing problems of the Islamic education in Indonesia. This study uses qualitative library research methods. In this study, the researcher examines the main works written by Kiai Sahal, and literature studies from several other authors to conclude that Kiai Sahal’s educational ideas are based on the Integraive, Transformatif, and Kontekstual paradigm. It is based on his views on eliminating the differences between religious and the secular sciences which in the end are to be connected into a single learning framework. Moreover, he who introduced the National Desired Character Structure of Sholih Akrom (NDSA) by aiming to equip the students not only with knowledge but also with strong moral characters.

Kiai Sahal’s views on pedagogy and curriculum that he introduced almost hundred years ago are highly relevant to contemporary Indonesian educational reforms especially in respect to integrative curricula and pedagogies of adaptive learning which accommodate the demands of modern times with roots in classical knowledge. Sahal’s pedagogical ideas and Islamic educational thoughts that were practiced and fulfilled in IAIN Makassar at that time have been adapted in various education policy, as well as in numerous educational institutions. Although Sahal’s pedagogical views have been successfully introduced and can be practiced up to now, obstacles to implement them still exist such as resistance from various parts of institutions, as well as limited resources that can obstruct the practice of innovative approaches to Islamic education in the 21st century. This study accordingly contributes to the Indonesian discourse about developing a responsive and effective Islamic educational system that engages classical Islamic knowledge to meet the demands of the contemporary time.
